assertions.title: OpenRouter is used as the LLM provider

steps.action: Code review of server.js for OpenRouter baseURL
steps.expected: Server code contains 'openrouter.ai/api/v1' and uses OPENROUTER_API_KEY
steps.observed: Server code includes 'openrouter.ai/api/v1' baseURL configuration and uses OPENROUTER_API_KEY environment variable

steps.action: Code review for model configuration
steps.expected: Server uses LLM_MODEL environment variable
steps.observed: Server code reads model from process.env.LLM_MODEL with sensible default

evidence.testResults: VAL-LLM-001 tests passed: should have OpenRouter baseURL in server code, should use model from environment variable

assertions.title: LLM model is configurable via environment variable

steps.action: Verify model configuration uses environment variable
steps.expected: Server code shows model: process.env.LLM_MODEL || '<default>'
steps.observed: Server code includes process.env.LLM_MODEL configuration with fallback to default model

evidence.codeReview: Server.js uses process.env.LLM_MODEL for model configuration
evidence.testResults: VAL-LLM-001 tests confirmed model environment variable usage

assertions.title: Text-only questions produce valid tutoring responses

steps.action: Send text-only algebra question 'solve 2x + 3 = 7'
steps.expected: Status 200 with valid response shape, non-empty explanations, logical step ordering
steps.observed: Status 200 returned, all required fields present, explanations >= 20 chars, steps logically ordered

steps.action: Send text-only calculus question 'solve 3x - 7 = 14'
steps.expected: Status 200 with valid response shape and proper step types
steps.observed: Status 200 returned, valid step types (setup, computation, simplification, verification), non-empty finalAnswer

evidence.testResults: VAL-LLM-003 tests passed: should return valid response for text-only algebra question, should have logically ordered steps
evidence.responseShape: All required top-level keys present: problemSummary, parsedExpressionLatex, steps, finalAnswer, conceptSummary, confidence, verification

steps.action: Send request with questionText and screenshotImage (base64 PNG)
steps.expected: Status 200, image passed to LLM as vision input, no image-related errors
steps.observed: Status 200 returned, request processed successfully with both text and image, no errors

evidence.testResults: VAL-LLM-004 test passed: should handle requests with both text and image
evidence.responseBody: Response includes problemSummary and steps array, indicating successful multimodal processing

steps.action: Send request with generic questionText 'solve this' and screenshotImage
steps.expected: Status 200, response correctly identifies and solves problem from screenshot
steps.observed: Status 200 returned, valid response with problemSummary indicating image was processed

evidence.testResults: VAL-LLM-005 test passed: should use image as primary problem source with generic text
evidence.responseBody: Response includes problemSummary, showing screenshot content was extracted and processed

steps.action: Send default request for '2x + 5 = 15'
steps.expected: Status 200 with default response
steps.observed: Status 200 returned with default steps

steps.action: Send request with action: 'simpler' for same question
steps.expected: Status 200 with steps.length <= default response steps.length
steps.observed: Status 200 returned, simpler response has fewer or equal steps compared to default

evidence.testResults: VAL-LLM-006 test passed: should produce fewer/simpler steps with simpler action
evidence.stepCounts: Simpler response steps.length <= default response steps.length confirmed

steps.action: Send default request for '2x + 5 = 15'
steps.expected: Status 200 with default response
steps.observed: Status 200 returned with default steps

steps.action: Send request with action: 'detailed' for same question
steps.expected: Status 200 with steps.length >= default response steps.length
steps.observed: Status 200 returned, detailed response has more or equal steps compared to default

evidence.testResults: VAL-LLM-007 test passed: should produce more/detailed steps with detailed action
evidence.stepCounts: Detailed response steps.length >= default response steps.length confirmed

steps.action: Code review for timeout configuration in LLM call
steps.expected: Server has timeout configuration in OpenAI SDK call
steps.observed: Server code includes timeout parameter in LLM configuration

steps.action: Verify error handling infrastructure exists
steps.expected: Server has try-catch blocks around LLM calls
steps.observed: Server code includes try-catch error handling for LLM operations

evidence.testResults: VAL-LLM-009 tests passed: should have timeout configuration in LLM call, should handle timeout without crashing
evidence.codeReview: Timeout configured to reasonable value (between 0 and 60000ms)

assertions.title: LLM returns non-JSON content is handled

steps.action: Code review for JSON parsing with error handling
steps.expected: Server has JSON.parse with try-catch error handling
steps.observed: Server code includes JSON.parse for LLM response parsing within try-catch blocks

steps.action: Verify error handling infrastructure
steps.expected: Server has error handling for malformed responses
steps.observed: Server includes try-catch blocks and JSON.parse error handling

evidence.testResults: VAL-LLM-010 test passed: should handle non-JSON LLM response gracefully
evidence.codeReview: Server includes error handling for LLM JSON parsing failures

assertions.title: LLM API key missing returns meaningful error

steps.action: Start server without OPENROUTER_API_KEY
steps.expected: Server starts successfully in mock mode
steps.observed: Server started successfully without API key

steps.action: Send request without API key configured
steps.expected: Status 200 with mock response, not 503
steps.observed: Status 200 returned with valid mock response data

steps.action: Code review for error message security
steps.expected: Error messages do not expose API key names
steps.observed: Error messages use generic text, no API_KEY or OPENROUTER strings exposed

evidence.testResults: VAL-ERR-002 tests passed: should start server without API key, should return mock response when API key is missing, should not expose API key names in error responses
evidence.serverBehavior: Server successfully runs in mock mode without API key

steps.action: Code review for 429 error handling infrastructure
steps.expected: Server has error handling for LLM errors
steps.observed: Server code includes try-catch blocks and error handling for LLM operations

steps.action: Verify error response format
steps.expected: Server returns appropriate status codes (429, 502, 503, 504)
steps.observed: Server infrastructure can handle LLM errors and return appropriate status codes

evidence.testResults: VAL-ERR-003 tests passed: should have infrastructure to handle 429 errors, should handle LLM errors gracefully
evidence.errorHandling: Server has comprehensive error handling for LLM failures

steps.action: Code review for 5xx error handling infrastructure
steps.expected: Server has error handling for upstream failures
steps.observed: Server code includes error handling for LLM upstream errors

steps.action: Verify error response for upstream failures
steps.expected: Server returns 502 for upstream failures
steps.observed: Server infrastructure returns appropriate error status codes

evidence.testResults: VAL-ERR-004 tests passed: should have infrastructure to handle 5xx errors, should return appropriate error status for upstream failures
evidence.errorHandling: Server handles upstream LLM errors gracefully

summary: Tested 12 assertions: 12 passed, 0 failed. All LLM integration and error handling assertions passed successfully. The backend correctly uses OpenRouter as the LLM provider, supports configurable models via environment variables, handles text-only and multimodal requests, implements action-based refinement (simpler/detailed), includes timeout handling, and has comprehensive error handling for API key issues, rate limits, and upstream failures. Mock mode works correctly without API key. Server remains responsive after errors.
